Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Acintya bheda-abheda tattva

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2007-07-12 · 3 answers
Can the concept acintya bheda-abheda tattva be applied to more instances or just to the jiva/Vishnu-tattva relation?
user [12] · 2007-07-12
Jiva - Vishnu-tattva relation is everything. That means how we are superior to material energy but still stuck in it.

Do you mean applied in relation to jiva or other things too?
user [15] · 2007-07-12
i heard somewhere that this acintya philosophy can only be applied to explain the visnu/jivas relationship. But sometimes I hear it applies to other concepts.
I do not have the VedaBase, maybe someone can look the term for me and check.
user [6] · 2007-07-26
you can find dozens of examples applied to acyntya-abheda in the vedabase. It is the foundation of our vaishnava philosophy
